name: Satone Shichimiya
description: Yuuta's friend from middle school with whom she went on delusional adventures. Shichimiya believes to have a magical ring called "Saturn VII" and calls herself "Sophia Ring SP Saturn VII." ~!During their middle school time, she realized that she fell in love with Yuuta but in the end decided not to change and remain a magical girl. Once reunited in present time, the old feelings eventually come back and she has to make the choice again - this time supporting Rikka.!~

name: Excalibur
description: The legendary sword used by heroes and kings. It has a great power that is unmatched by any other weapon. It turns out that anyone can use Excalibur. However, no one can put up with its personality (it has a bigger ego than Black Star). The only reason that those who use it are called heroes is that they can put up with its annoying habits, such as a list of one-thousand things he demands to be completed, such as daily five-hour reading sessions. name: Sawako Yamanaka
description: __Height:__ 165 cm Sawako is the adviser for the wind instrument club at Yui's school. An alumna of the school and a former member of the light music club, she does not want people to know she was formerly a member of a heavy metal band, thus she covers up by being mild and gentle to her co-workers and especially to students. name: Aoi Hinami
description: Aoi is [Tomozaki](https://anilist.co/character/136978)'s classmate, and the number two ranked player at the fighting game 'Tackfam'. She excels at everything she tries due to her hard-working attitude, so much so that many regard her as being outright perfect. To most people, she seems like a happy-go-lucky, carefree student. However, Tomozaki soon learns that she's a very serious, accommodating, supportive, yet somewhat harsh and rude person.

name: Hina
description: A strange girl with supernatural powers that suddenly comes into Nitta's house in a strange box. She usually has a problem communicating properly with other people and rarely shows emotion.

name: Ranko Mannen
description: **Height:** 166 cm A 35-year-old woman with a stern, professional demeanor at all times, whether serving patrons at the cafe or gunning down rival maids. Despite being introduced as a rookie at the Oinky Doink Cafe, Ranko has a history in the world of the Akiba Maids stretching back over a decade. She previously spent some time in prison.

name: Kaina Tsutsumi
description: __Quirk:__ Rifle A villain who used to be a Pro Hero. Kaina Tsutsumi can protrude and retract a rifle from her right elbow, which she can fire bullets out of with a range of 3 kilometers. She can create and use different types of bullets by mixing and molding her hair, such as hollow-point bullets and curving bullets.
